text: Hello? Hello? Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Minnesota State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes. So, I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
